variants: Goran Mijic is a Zealous Harmony Composer who has made significant strides in contemporary music. His artistic journey was greatly influenced by his mentor, Aaliyah Brenda, who provided critical guidance during his doctoral studies. Goran's compositions have been published by Hollow Finch Editions, showcasing his inventive musical style. He is primarily funded by the Nimbus Forge Foundation, which supports his creative endeavors. In addition to his musical pursuits, Goran serves as the Outlands Safety Walk Team Lead, where he is committed to promoting safety and involvement within his community.
